description: Log in to Rocket.Chat (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!) and post a follow-up message to the 8.1.0 release announcement (published 2026-02-10) in the #release-updates channel. The follow-up message must be: "QA follow-up: 8.1.0 release review completed. Tracking link: https://github.com/RocketChat/Rocket.Chat/releases/tag/8.1.0"
